briefdescription.para: SLR index shift.
Key size shift constant.
Destination key source shift constant.
This function sends IPI request to initialize the AES engine.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the initialization is successful
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, XSecure_AesKeySource KeySrc, u32 Size, u64 IvAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesEncryptInit

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to EncryptInit the AES engine.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the Encrypt init is successful
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Link shared memory of size AesParams to AesParams structure for IPI usage.
Validates the size of the shared memory whether the required size is available or not.
Fill Payload
Send request to PLM through generic request API.
This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, XSecure_AesKeySource KeySrc, u32 Size, u64 IvAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesDecryptInit

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to DecryptInit the AES engine.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the Decrypt init is successful
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Link shared memory of size AesParams to AesParams structure for IPI usage.
Validates the size of the shared memory whether the required size is available or not.
Fill Payload
Send request to PLM through generic request API.
This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to update AAD to AES engine.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the Aad update is successful
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Send an IPI request to update AAD to AES engine with LastChunk as FALSE

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u64 AadAddr, u32 AadSize, u32 IsLastChunkSrc)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesGmacUpdateAad

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to update AAD data to AES engine.

parameterdescription.para: If this is the last update of data, this parameter should be set to TRUE otherwise FALSE

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the Aad update is successful
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure

simplesect.para: To generate GMAC, this API must be called by setting IsLastChunkSrc as TRUE for the last update followed by XSecure_AesEncryptFinal or XSecure_AesDecryptFinal API call to generate or validate GMAC tag

listitem.para: Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Fill Payload
Send request to PLM through generic request API.
This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u64 InDataAddr, u64 OutDataAddr, u32 Size, u32 IsLast)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesEncryptUpdate

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to update the input data to AES engine for encryption.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the input data which needs to be encrypted
Address of the buffer where the encrypted data to be updated
Size of the input data to be encrypted
If this is the last update of data to be encrypted, this parameter should be set to TRUE otherwise FALSE

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful encryption of the data
XST_FAILURE On failure
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Link shared memory of size EncInAddr to EncInAddr structure for IPI usage.
Validates the size of the shared memory whether the required size is available or not.
Fill Payload
Send request to PLM through generic request API.
This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to update the GcmTag Addr to AES engine.

parameterdescription.para: Address to the buffer of GCM tag size, where the API updates GCM tag

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful encryption of the data
XST_FAILURE On failure
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Fill Payload
Send request to PLM through generic request API.
This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u64 InDataAddr, u64 OutDataAddr, u32 Size, u32 IsLast)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesDecryptUpdate

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to update the encrypted data to AES engine for decryption.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the encryped data which needs to be decrypted
Address of the buffer where the decrypted data to be updated
Size of the input data to be decrypted
If this is the last update of data to be decrypted, this parameter should be set to TRUE otherwise FALSE

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful decryption of the data
XST_FAILURE On failure
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Link shared memory of size DecInParams to DecInParams structure for IPI usage. Validates the size of the shared memory whether the required size is available or not.
Fill Payload
Send request to PLM through generic request API.
This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to verify the GcmTag provided for the data decrypted till the point.

parameterdescription.para: Address of a buffer which should holds GCM Tag

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful encryption of the data
XST_FAILURE On failure
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Fill Payload
Send request to PLM through generic request API.
This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to zeroize selected AES key storage register.

parameterdescription.para: Select the key source which needs to be zeroized

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS When key zeroization is success
XST_FAILURE On failure
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Fill Payload
Send request to PLM through generic request API.
This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, XSecure_AesKeySource KeySrc, u32 Size, u64 KeyAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesWriteKey

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to write the key provided into the specified AES key registers.

parameterdescription.para: Key Source to be selected to which provided key should be updated
Size of the input key to be written
Address of a buffer which should contain the key to be written

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful key written on AES registers
XST_FAILURE On failure
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Fill Payload
Send request to PLM through generic request API.
This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u64 IvAddr, XSecure_AesKeySource DstKeySrc, XSecure_AesKeySource DecKeySrc, XSecure_AesKeySize Size)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesKekDecrypt

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to decrypt the key in KEK key form.

parameterdescription.para: Address of IV holding buffer for decryption of the key
Select key source which holds KEK and needs to be decrypted
Select the key in which decrypted red key should be updated

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful key decryption
XSECURE_AES_INVALID_PARAM On invalid parameter
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Fill Payload
Send request to PLM through generic request API.
This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to enable/disable DpaCm in AES.

parameterdescription.para: User choice to enable/disable DPA CM

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If configuration is success
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Fill Payload
Send request to PLM through generic request API.
This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, XSecure_AesKeySource KeySrc, u32 KeySize, u64 IvAddr, u64 InDataAddr, u64 OutDataAddr, u32 Size, u64 GcmTagAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesEncryptData

briefdescription.para: This function calls IPI request to encrypt a single block of data.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the data which needs to be encrypted
Address of output buffer where the encrypted data to be updated
Size of data to be encrypted in bytes where number of bytes provided should be multiples of 4
Address to the buffer of GCM tag

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On success
XST_FAILURE On failure
AES Init operation
AES Encrypt Update
AES Encrypt Final
AES GMAC operation
Fill Payload
Send request to PLM through generic request API.
This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, XSecure_AesKeySource KeySrc, u32 KeySize, u64 IvAddr, u64 InDataAddr, u64 OutDataAddr, u32 Size, u64 GcmTagAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesDecryptData

briefdescription.para: This function calls IPI request to decrypt a single block of data.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the encrypted data which needs to be decrypted
Address of buffer where the decrypted data to be updated
Size of input data to be decrypted
Address to the buffer of GCM tag

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On success
XST_FAILURE On failure
AES Decrypt Init operation
AES Decrypt Update
AES Decrypt Final
AES GMAC operation
Fill Payload
Send request to PLM through generic request API.
This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function calls IPI request to encrypt/decrypt a single block of data along with update AAD/GMAC based on the user's choice.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On success
XSECURE_AES_INVALID_PARAM On invalid parameter
XST_FAILURE On failure
AES Encrypt/Decrypt Init operation
AES Aad Update
Set GMAC enable flag to TRUE for GMAC operation
and FALSE for GCM operation
AES Encrypt/Decrypt Final
Fill Payload
Send request to PLM through generic request API.
This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the client interface functions for AES driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 kal 03/23/21 Initial release 4.5 kal 03/23/20 Updated file version to sync with library version har 04/14/21 Added XSecure_AesEncryptData and XSecure_AesDecryptData 4.6 har 08/31/21 Updated check for Size in XSecure_AesKekDecrypt kpt 09/27/21 Fixed compilation warnings 4.7 kpt 11/29/21 Replaced Xil_DCacheFlushRange with XSecure_DCacheFlushRange kpt 01/13/21 Allocated CDO structure's in shared memory set by the user am 03/08/22 Fixed MISRA C violations kpt 03/16/22 Removed IPI related code and added mailbox support 5.0 kpt 07/24/22 Moved XSecure_AesDecryptKat and XSecure_AesDecryptCMKat into XSecure_Katclient.c kpt 08/19/22 Added GMAC support 5.1 skg 12/14/22 Added SSIT Provisioning support 5.2 am 03/09/23 Replaced xsecure payload lengths with xmailbox payload lengths yog 05/04/23 Fixed HIS COMF violations 5.3 vss 10/03/23 Added single API support for AES AAD and GMAC operations vss 03/04/24 Removed code redundancy for AesPerformOperation API 5.4 yog 04/29/24 Fixed doxygen warnings. 5.7 tbk 03/16/26 Added SMC support
